highlights: Contributed to building a Certificate Authority product from scratch, implementing OCSP per RFC 6960 for 10,000+ certificates.
Developed admin panel pages (Razor Pages) for certificate lifecycle management across multiple CAs/RAs/OCSPs, including CRL distribution routing via YARP.
Designed and maintained a service layer within the company's internal API gateway in Node.js, used by all 6 product teams.
Built version control and lifecycle management for 100+ internal API wrappers, reducing cross-team maintenance overhead by 50%.
Migrated a legacy MVC backend to a layered Node.js/Express.js architecture, accelerating feature deployment by 40%.
Migrated MongoDB to domestic servers, achieving a 2.5x improvement in database performance.
Built backend and frontend for an e-commerce platform using Node.js, PostgreSQL, and React.js.
Developed automation scripts, Telegram bots, and a .NET WinForms accounting application.
